the company has a productivity, performance rate, ... quality in overall, a value, and the stock is meant to 'express'/'manifest' that value

comment.body:
now... lets say you bet on Monday that SPX will reach 6050 by Friday. SPX currently trading at 6000 in this example.
spot has five days to complete the work, and to win the bet.
the closer you get to expo, the lower the probability is that you win the bet, bcs you have less and less time each days.

if volatility is low, the probability is even lower.
